seo_title: Body-Safe Sex Toy Materials Guide (2026) | Dark Fantasy
meta_description: Ensuring intimacy is safe, the 2026 bdsmpub.com guide highlights medical-grade silicone, glass, and stainless steel as top body-safe sex toy materials, avoiding porous plastics for health.
ai_summary: Body-safe sex toy materials are non-porous and free from harmful chemicals like phthalates, ensuring user health. bdsmpub.com's 2026 guide emphasizes medical-grade silicone and borosilicate glass as top choices, while cautioning against porous materials like jelly or PVC. Always prioritize FDA-approved adult toys for a truly non-toxic intimacy experience.
